contexts.context: ...in Otway;[Page 204]————— A <mark>wrinkled</mark> hag with age grown double,Picking dry sticks...
...her eyes sunk, her forehead contracted into perpetual <mark>wrinkles</mark>, and her temples were covered with a wreath...
...sentiments of his mind unfolded themselves, without trench or <mark>wrinkle</mark>, in his honest countenance and impassioned features....
...that once celebrated beauty—that she is now too <mark>wrinkled</mark> for curling hair; and her complexion too faded...
